item.name: 🗑️ Delete Account
item.description:
Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data.

✅ NO JSON body is needed.
The role (candidate or employer) is automatically read from the Bearer JWT token.

Just paste the correct login token in the Authorization header and send the DELETE request.

⚠️ THIS ACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE.

item.name: Delete Account — CANDIDATE (use candidate login token)

header.description: Log in as a candidate first, then paste the token here.

request.description:
DELETE /api/auth/delete-account

✅ NO BODY REQUIRED — The server determines your role from your JWT token automatically.

How to test:
1. Login as a Candidate using POST /api/auth/login-email or /login-mobile
2. Copy the token from the response
3. Paste it in the Authorization header above as: Bearer <token>
4. Send this DELETE request

What gets deleted for CANDIDATE:
- CandidateUser account
- CandidateProfile (education, experience, skills, etc.)
- All Applications (jobs applied to)
- All Bookmarks (saved jobs)
- All Notifications

⚠️ PERMANENT — Cannot be undone.

item.name: Delete Account — EMPLOYER (use employer login token)

header.description: Log in as an employer first, then paste the token here.

request.description:
DELETE /api/auth/delete-account

✅ NO BODY REQUIRED — The server determines your role from your JWT token automatically.

How to test:
1. Login as an Employer using POST /api/auth/login-email or /login-mobile
2. Copy the token from the response
3. Paste it in the Authorization header above as: Bearer <token>
4. Send this DELETE request

What gets deleted for EMPLOYER:
- EmployeeUser account
- CompanyProfile (logo, documents, company info)
- All Notifications (sent and received)

⚠️ PERMANENT — Cannot be undone.
Returns top 10 recommended jobs for page 1. Response includes totalJobs, totalPages, currentPage, limit.
